description: Header navegación + tooltip de scheduling + botón acción toolbar (P18_imagen1)
pre_capture_js: (() => { const btn = document.querySelector("div.header__right gs-nav-button[data-qa-id='scheduling'] a.nav-button"); if (!btn) return; const center = (r) => ({ x: r.left + (r.width / 2), y: r.top + (r.height / 2) }); const dist2 = (a, b) => { const dx = a.x - b.x; const dy = a.y - b.y; return (dx * dx) + (dy * dy); }; const tooltipCandidates = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('gs-tooltip')).filter((el) => el.querySelector('p.tooltip')); if (!tooltipCandidates.length) return; const btnCenter = center(btn.getBoundingClientRect()); const tooltipHost = tooltipCandidates.sort((a, b) => { const ar = a.getBoundingClientRect(); const br = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return dist2(center(ar), btnCenter) - dist2(center(br), btnCenter); })[0]; const tooltipText = tooltipHost.querySelector('p.tooltip'); if (!tooltipText) return; tooltipHost.setAttribute('data-capture-anchor', 'scheduling-tooltip'); if (tooltipHost.parentElement !== document.body) document.body.appendChild(tooltipHost); tooltipHost.style.position = 'fixed'; tooltipHost.style.zIndex = '99999'; tooltipHost.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; tooltipHost.style.display = 'block'; tooltipHost.style.visibility = 'visible'; tooltipText.style.display = 'block'; tooltipText.style.visibility = 'visible'; tooltipText.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap'; const br = btn.getBoundingClientRect(); const tr0 = tooltipHost.getBoundingClientRect(); const tw = tr0.width || tooltipText.getBoundingClientRect().width || 120; const th = tr0.height || tooltipText.getBoundingClientRect().height || 28; const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth || 1920; let left = br.left + (br.width / 2) - (tw / 2); left = Math.max(4, Math.min((vw - tw - 4), left)); let top = br.top - th - 8; if (top < 4) top = br.bottom + 8; tooltipHost.style.left = `${Math.round(left)}px`; tooltipHost.style.top = `${Math.round(top)}px`; })();
